title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map caught up
gist.blurb: The API reference got its post-deploy pollen dusting. Five fresh lines, one less reason to guess at an endpoint.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference reflects the latest deployed endpoints and schema details.
gist.impact: Developers can rely on the API docs to match the production service without cross-checking the live specification.
gist.visual_concept: Polly, wearing tiny librarian glasses, updates a glowing API reference book beside a retro terminal that has just sprouted a few new code-leaves; the scene represents documentation synchronizing with the deployed API.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute pixel bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown stripes, black antennae, oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blushes, a happy smile, light blue rounded wings, and tiny librarian glasses carefully adding fresh code-leaves to a glowing API reference book beside a retro terminal. Lime green (#ecf874) shines prominently from the screen and code-plants grow from warm cream pots around the desk; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, with subtle pixel-font text: 'API DOCS'.
